title: nigritella rubra subsp. widderi
intro: Nigritella rubra subsp. widderi, also known as the Widder's navel, is a subspecies of orchid native to the alpine regions of Switzerland. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nigritella rubra subsp. widderi include its potential to improve sleep quality, reduce anxiety and stress, and boost the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tincture or infusion, and its herbal preparations are used to promote relaxation and well-being.
